rationale: The proposed change concerns a property-tax homestead exemption amount under Tax Code §11.13(b). Gov't Code §2001.1721 governs de novo judicial review of agency legal determinations. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and do not conflict.
quote: in any matter brought under this subchapter, the reviewing court shall review all questions of law de novo
_note: No overlap between proposed homestead exemption increase and judicial-review standard statute.
